name: Fuuka
description: A kunoichi that appears in the first filler arc of Shippuuden. She is part of the group of grave robbers who have dug up four of the dead Twelve Guardian Ninja. Despite her young and beautiful appearance, her unusual powers and hagged appearance at one point suggest that she is much older than she seems. She is seen being very interested in people with wind elemental chakra like Naruto.
